top_recommendations.impact_statement: Connecting **Listening as Trust-Building** (challenge) to **suppose: big area → is anxiety** (claim) bridges an isolated cluster into the main network component. Would open **27 new perception/narrative pathways**. This is a **learning bridge** — it connects value dimensions that were previously separate, enabling cross-coalition diffusion.
